source: Vietnam Customs — 5X '(ta-sb)' preliminary bulletins (2024-02 onward, all coffee) stitched with the Export_Destination_Port.xlsx series (2014-10 → 2024-08, green bean) for earlier / gap months
coverage_note: The 5X bulletin lists coffee only for countries where it is a 'main export' line (~85-94% of the 2x national total); pre-2024 months are the green-bean XLSX series, which agrees with the 5X within ~0-12% on overlap months.
